creator: jguojun@sbcglobal.net
text:
Created attachment 193772
crash log

Using either Firefox or Chrome access following URL will take system down:

www.visualcapitalist.com/interactive-map-price-per-square-foot-us-housing-markets

Firefox typically hangs the system forever, and Chrome crashes the system immediately.

Browser specific issues:
After crash, system reboots and cleans FS up (done by fsck) , firefox can be started without issue, but starting Chrome will continue to crash the system and generate coredump (crash log is attached); and somehow, a few Chrome crashes can erase Firefox's history and settings (not intentionally to repeat this issue because chrome crash damages the file system badly).
